title: Google calendar
excerpt: Hello, I’m trying to sync between Monday and Google Calendar. I follow the instructions and after that I see in Google only numbers and not a topic. Monday and Google are in a different email. Thank you

posts.author: AlonLamdani (AlonL)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I’m trying to sync between Monday and Google Calendar. I follow the instructions and after that I see in Google only numbers and not a topic. Monday and Google are in a different email. Thank you

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AlonLamdani !

The default sync between Monday and Google Calendar will pull in those numbers (Item ID). What I would suggest is that you use the integration along with the integration recipe to properly map Monday.com columns to fields in Google Calendar.

If you haven’t this Monday.com Support Article walks through it well!
